description: Restaurant Scope of Work: Structural Renovation and Building Improvements The proposed project involves a comprehensive structural renovation and reconstruction of the existing building. The scope of work includes: • Roof Replacement: Complete removal of the existing roof and installation of a new roofing system to ensure structural integrity and weather resistance. • Siding Replacement: Removal and replacement of all exterior siding with updated, durable materials to improve both appearance and insulation. • Exterior and Interior Painting: Full painting of the building’s exterior and interior surfaces to enhance curb appeal and interior aesthetics. • Plumbing System Overhaul: Upgrading the plumbing system, including replacement of outdated pipes, fixtures, and water lines to meet current building codes and efficiency standards. • Electrical System Update: Replacement and rewiring of the building’s electrical system, including new panels, outlets, switches, and lighting to ensure safety and code compliance. • Drywall Installation: Repair or replacement of damaged Sheetrock (drywall) throughout the interior for a clean, finished look. • Debris Removal and Site Cleanup: Proper disposal of construction debris and a thorough cleanup of the worksite during and after the renovation process. . New HVAC AND GAS system This renovation is intended to improve the safety, functionality, and appearance of the property while bringing the structure up to modern
